home.heroSubtext:
Sacred Art. Timeless Heritage.
Connecting Wisdom with the World.
home.categoriesDesc: Rich in themes and diverse in style, thangkas reflect the vast and profound culture of Tibetan Buddhism.
home.noCms: Categories will appear here once the CMS is connected.
home.historyFallback: Thangka art flourished over a thousand years ago in Tibet, influenced by Indian, Nepalese, and Chinese culture. It has become a unique spiritual art form of Tibetan Buddhism.
home.deitiesFallback: Each thangka features a principal deity — Buddha, Bodhisattva, Deity, or Protector — representing profound spiritual meanings and guiding practitioners on the path to enlightenment.
home.storyFallback: We are devoted to preserving and sharing the sacred art of thangka, collaborating with master artists to bring the beauty of Tibetan culture to the world.
